prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large blue metal cylinder
  - obj_1: small blue rubber cube
  - obj_2: small blue metal sphere
  - obj_3: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_4: small yellow metal cube
  - obj_5: small purple rubber sphere
  - obj_6: large yellow rubber sphere
  - obj_7: small green rubber cylinder
  - obj_8: large green metal cylinder
  - obj_9: small green rubber sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0141] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0142] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0143] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0144] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0145] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0146] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0147] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0148] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0149] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0150] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0151] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0152] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0153] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0154] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0155] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0156] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0157] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0158] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0159] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0160] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D scene and compare distances between pairs of objects for each question.

Let me first estimate the positions of each object based on the image:
- obj_0 (large blue metal cylinder): back-left area
- obj_1 (small blue rubber cube): front-center area
- obj_2 (small blue metal sphere): center-back area
- obj_3 (small green rubber sphere): left area, near back
- obj_4 (small yellow metal cube): center area
- obj_5 (small purple rubber sphere): right area
- obj_6 (large yellow rubber sphere): right-center area
- obj_7 (small green rubber cylinder): left-center area
- obj_8 (large green metal cylinder): back-right area
- obj_9 (small green rubber sphere): center-front area

Now let me estimate distances for the comparisons:

obj_0 to obj_6: large blue cylinder (back-left) to large yellow sphere (right-center) - fairly large distance, roughly 8-9 units

For each comparison:

qrr_0141: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_8: obj_2 (center-back) to obj_8 (back-right) - moderate distance ~3-4 units. obj_0-obj_6 > obj_2-obj_8, so ">"

qrr_0142: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_9: obj_2 (center-back) to obj_9 (center-front) - moderate distance ~4-5 units. obj_0-obj_6 > obj_2-obj_9, so ">"

qrr_0143: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_3-obj_4: obj_3 (left-back) to obj_4 (center) - moderate ~4-5 units. obj_0-obj_6 >, so ">"

qrr_0144: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_3-obj_5: obj_3 (left-back) to obj_5 (right) - large distance ~7-8 units. obj_0-obj_6 ~= obj_3-obj_5, so "~="

qrr_0145: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_3-obj_7: obj_3 to obj_7 - very close, ~2 units. obj_0-obj_6 >, so ">"

qrr_0146: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_4-obj_7: obj_4 (center) to obj_7 (left-center) - small ~3 units. obj_0-obj_6 >, so ">"

qrr_0147: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_4-obj_8: obj_4 (center) to obj_8 (back-right) - moderate ~5-6 units. obj_0-obj_6 >, so ">"

qrr_0148: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_4-obj_9: obj_4 to obj_9 - small ~2 units. obj_0-obj_6 >, so ">"

qrr_0149: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_5-obj_7: obj_5 (right) to obj_7 (left-center) - moderate ~4-5 units. obj_0-obj_6 >, so ">"

qrr_0150: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_5-obj_8: obj_5 (right) to obj_8 (back-right) - moderate ~4-5 units. obj_0-obj_6 >, so ">"

qrr_0151: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_5-obj_9: obj_5 (right) to obj_9 (center-front) - moderate ~3-4 units. obj_0-obj_6 >, so ">"

qrr_0152: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_7-obj_8: obj_7 (left-center) to obj_8 (back-right) - large ~6-7 units. obj_0-obj_6 ~= obj_7-obj_8, so "~="

qrr_0153: obj_0-obj_6 vs obj_7-obj_9: obj_7 (left-center) to obj_9 (center-front) - moderate ~3-4 units. obj_0-obj_6 >, so ">"

obj_0 to obj_7: large blue cylinder (back-left) to green rubber cylinder (left-center) - moderate ~4-5 units

qrr_0154: obj_0-obj_7 vs obj_1-obj_2: obj_1 (front-center) to obj_2 (center-back) - large ~6 units. obj_0-obj_7 < obj_1-obj_2, so "<"

qrr_0155: obj_0-obj_7 vs obj_1-obj_3: obj_1 (front) to obj_3 (left-back) - large ~6-7 units. obj_0-obj_7 < obj_1-obj_3, so "<"

qrr_0156: obj_0-obj_7 vs obj_1-obj_5: obj_1 (front-center) to obj_5 (right) - moderate ~5 units. obj_0-obj_7 ~= obj_1-obj_5, so "~="

qrr_0157: obj_0-obj_7 vs obj_1-obj_8: obj_1 (front) to obj_8 (back-right) - very large ~9 units. obj_0-obj_7 <, so "<"

qrr_0158: obj_0-obj_7 vs obj_1-obj_9: obj_1 to obj_9 - small ~2 units. obj_0-obj_7 >, so ">"

qrr_0159: obj_0-obj_7 vs obj_2-obj_4: obj_2 (center-back) to obj_4 (center) - moderate ~3 units. obj_0-obj_7 >, so ">"

qrr_0160: obj_0-obj_7 vs obj_2-obj_5: obj_2 (center-back) to obj_5 (right) - moderate ~4-5 units. obj_0-obj_7 ~= obj_2-obj_5, so "~="
